description: 31 MCP tools for ESG data extraction, PDF processing, vector search, and EU regulation analysis.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.freminder/esg-mcp-servers

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key — required for RAG queries and LLM-based metric extraction
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL connection string with pgvector extension (e.g. postgresql://esg:esg@localhost/esg_platform)
environmentVariables.name: POSTGRES_DSN

environmentVariables.description: MongoDB connection string for PDF binary storage via GridFS (e.g. mongodb://localhost:27017)
environmentVariables.name: MONGODB_URI

environmentVariables.description: Sentence-transformer model name for embedding generation (default: Snowflake/snowflake-arctic-embed-l-v2.0)
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_MODEL

title: ESG MCP Servers
